name: Senolytics exact-effect extraction follow-up repair
summary: Clarifies the senolytics coverage-repair record after the bounded extraction-refresh review: DKD, IPF, and AD-risk PubMed snapshots support only metadata-level abstract extraction, D+Q bone article and registry material remain source-located, and full article/table extraction debt remains open for DKD, IPF, AD-risk, and D+Q supplement material.

scope.question: Repair the senolytics exact-effect extraction follow-up coverage gap using the scoped PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, and PMC author-manuscript snapshots without promoting or claiming full article/table extraction where retained artifacts are absent.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded extraction-refresh repair candidate and its required review lanes.

Clarifies that the DKD, IPF, and AD-risk PubMed EFetch snapshots are metadata-only abstract sources, preserves the D+Q retained registry/PMC article support, and keeps full article/table and supplement extraction debt explicit.
